title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Zoho Corporation in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zoho Corporation:
Zoho Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation!
